programme.title: Школа
programme.desc: Успешная бизнес-леди Катя узнает, что её дочь пыталась покончить жизнь самоубийством. Как оказалось, не впервые. Чтобы быть ближе к дочери и понять, чем на самом деле занимаются дети в школе, она начинает работать учительницей экономики. Молодая мама понятия не имела, какие секреты скрываются за стенами обычной школы. Тогда же в учебное заведение приходит новый преподаватель английского - бывший адвокат и сын директора Алекс. У него есть невеста, которая живет в США, но вдруг между ним и Екатериной промелькнула искра. Впрочем, скелеты прошлого всё ещё дают о себе знать и не отпускают героев...

programme.title: Школа
programme.desc: Успешная бизнес-леди Катя узнает, что её дочь пыталась покончить жизнь самоубийством. Как оказалось, не впервые. programme.title: Женский доктор
programme.desc: Действие разворачивается в новой современной клинике, которую основал профессор Юрий Климов. Бывшему тестю доктора Романа Широкова остался лишь год до выхода на пенсию, и за это время он должен найти достойного преемника. Но это не главная причина, по которой профессор вновь приглашает Романа работать вместе. Роман Широков – единственный, кто может довести до конца инновационную научную разработку, от которой зависит судьба дочери профессора - Нины. Однако инвесторы и сотрудники клиники не рады появлению нового профессионала.

programme.title: Женский доктор
programme.desc: Действие разворачивается в новой современной клинике, которую основал профессор Юрий Климов. Бывшему тестю доктора Романа Широкова остался лишь год до выхода на пенсию, и за это время он должен найти достойного преемника. Но это не главная причина, по которой профессор вновь приглашает Романа работать вместе. Роман Широков – единственный, кто может довести до конца инновационную научную разработку, от которой зависит судьба дочери профессора - Нины. Однако инвесторы и сотрудники клиники не рады появлению нового профессионала.

programme.title: Женский доктор
programme.desc: Зинаида регулярно получает сообщения с угрозами от неизвестного мужчины. Ее муж Николай, известный меценат, настаивает, чтобы в клинике с его женой был телохранитель Петр. Доктор Родионов слышит, как Петр записывает в коридоре клиники сообщение с угрозами. Роман приводит на осмотр в клинику дочь Раду, желая убедиться, что она не бесплодна. С ним крестная мать Рады Рубина, которая и нагадала бесплодие. Выясняется, что отец Рады решил выдать дочь замуж против ее воли, и девушка всеми способами пытается избежать этого брака.

programme.title: Окно жизни
programme.desc: Славик и Надежда оказываются жертвами квартирных аферистов, поэтому после рождения второго ребёнка они вынуждены жить с семьёй Славика. Его сестра Алёна недовольна таким соседством. Славик уезжает на заработки. Пользуясь тем, что Славик в коме, Алёна выгоняет Надежду с детьми из квартиры. После длительных скитаний Надежда оставляет младенца в бэби-боксе. Соколова и Борадзе предлагают Глаше уволиться по собственному желанию. Борадзе сообщает коллективу о том, что подкидыша усыновила семья Нескоромовых. Коллектив перинатального центра прощается с Милославской - сердце коллеги остановилось. Славик выходит из комы, Алёна признается ему в своем вранье.

programme.title: Окно жизни
programme.desc: Славик и Надежда оказываются жертвами квартирных аферистов, поэтому после рождения второго ребёнка они вынуждены жить с семьёй Славика. Его сестра Алёна недовольна таким соседством. Коллектив перинатального центра прощается с Милославской - сердце коллеги остановилось. Славик выходит из комы, Алёна признается ему в своем вранье.

programme.title: Страх в твоем доме
programme.desc: Боль и страдания, которые причиняют самые близкие люди, невыносимы. Дом из крепости становится тюрьмой. И в поисках выхода людям приходится идти на самые невероятные поступки. Ни один сценарист не сможет придумать такие сюжетные ходы, которые порой закручивает сама жизнь. В социальной докудраме "Страх в твоем доме" - только реальные истории, случившиеся с реальными людьми. Мы реконструируем события, основываясь на откровенных рассказах их участников, а наши эксперты - юристы и психологи - комментируют их и помогают найти выход из сложных, порой тупиковых ситуаций.

programme.title: Страх в твоем доме

Вместе с тем, это не нудное поучительное рассуждение. Ленты также повествуют о личном выборе героя в сложных жизненных обстоятельствах, которые будут близки всем зрителям.

programme.title: Семейные мелодрамы
programme.desc: Это не выдуманные истории, а реконструкция реальных событий, которые могут случиться с каждой семьей. В каждой семье свои "Семейные мелодрамы", конфликты, накопившиеся проблемы с долговыми ямами, изменами, трудными детьми и конфликтами с родителями. Какой выход из этих ситуаций, достигших наивысшего апогея, когда никто не хочет его искать? Как же тогда жить дальше? Эти фильмы не заканчиваются хэппи-эндом, но, тем не менее, они будут интересны самому широкому кругу зрителей: от самых маленьких до людей в возрасте. Сюжет фильма обычно предполагает некое размышление или обсуждение, потому что он поднимает важные философские вопросы, заставляет задуматься о понятиях "любовь", "дружба", "верность", "предательство". Вместе с тем, это не нудное поучительное рассуждение. Ленты также повествуют о личном выборе героя в сложных жизненных обстоятельствах, которые будут близки всем зрителям.

programme.title: Cleanskin
programme.desc: Harry (Sam Douglas), a British people arms dealer, is seen in bed with a prostitute named Rena (Shivani Ghai). While toying with Harry's pistol, she unloads it but replaces the empty magazine. Harry's bodyguard Ewan (Sean Bean) is a British Secret Intelligence Service. Harry and Ewan travel to a bank, transporting a briefcase of Semtex. The men are followed by two terrorists, Ash (Abhin Galeya) and Ibrahim (Mens-Sana Tamakloe). Ibrahim approaches Harry and Ewan from the top of a staircase, shooting at them. After Ash shoots Ewan twice, Harry tries to shoot Ash, only to discover there are no bullets in his gun. Ash kills Harry and takes the briefcase of Semtex. However, Ewan manages to shoot Ash in the arm; but, before he can apprehend him, Ash returns fire and escapes with the briefcase.

programme.title: Noble Things
programme.desc: Jimmy Wayne Collins finds himself adrift in Memphis, Tennessee. Forced to return home to the piney woods of Southeast Texas, Jimmy will face his imprisoned brother, his dying father and the demons he left behind.

programme.title: Modigliani
programme.desc: American drama, produced in 2004. An American, French, German, Italian, Rumanian, and British co-production. The story of Amedeo Modigliani's bitter rivalry with Pablo Picasso, and his tragic romance with Jeanne Hebuterne.

programme.title: She's No Angel
programme.desc: A pregnant woman fleeing a violent boyfriend, boards a train and is taken into care by a newlywed couple. The train crashes, the couple are killed and the girl is taken for the dead newlywed wife because she was wearing her ring at the time the crash happened.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: Epic look at Julius Caesar, Rome's last dictator, whose death also signaled the end of the Roman Republic. Chronicles his campaigns in Gaul and Egypt, his rivalry with General Pompey, and his eventual assassination at the hands of Brutus and Cassius.

programme.title: Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: The Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding continues the story of 2003's fantasy romance The Prince and Me. In the earlier film, Paige (Julia Stiles) - a midwestern college co-ed - falls in love with Edvard (Luke Mably), sans realizing that he is actually the Prince of Denmark. In this sequel, Paige (now played by neophyte Kam Heskin) and Eddie must confront a centuries-old Danish edict declaring that if a Danish prince marries a commoner, he must abdicate his throne. C

programme.title: Mayor Cupcake
programme.desc: A hard-working cupcake maker is inadvertently elected mayor of a small town burdened with debt. With no formal experience or education to speak of, she must rely on her street smarts to clean up the town.

programme.title: House of the Stone Monkeys
programme.desc: The action proceeds along two tracks and two time frames. We meet the boy, who lives with his mother in a Budapest apartment house, in the summer of 2012. Another boy is spending his vacation with his grandparents in the same building in the summer of 1982. The house unveils its mysterious secret to both of them.

programme.title: Summer Dreams
programme.desc: Seventeen-year old Robbie Zirpollo has a problem. As the film opens, his mother is driving him to his new summer job. We learn that Robbie has grown up in Oceanside, California, but now he and his mother have moved to Colorado for a fresh start, as his father has taken the family's savings and his secretary to Mexico. Robbie's mom has, through an uncle, gotten him a summer job at Water World on the grounds crew. The adventure begins when Robbie meets Alex and gets moved to Aokee's Surf & Snack shack to work. Alex convinces Robbie to enter the park's "Employee Olympics" to bring the Surfer King trophy to it's rightful place among the concessions crew. Tiffany, the park owner's daughter, has other ideas for Robbie.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The story of Barry Minkow, a young charismatic business man who becomes a wealthy CEO by lying, cheating and stealing his way to the top.

programme.title: Irish Jam
programme.desc: A South Central L.A. con artist with rap skills tries to keep bill collectors and his lover, with marriage in mind, at bay by entering a poetry contest staged by a small Irish town. Can his rhyming skills help the town and win him the prize money?

programme.title: True Smile
programme.desc: Sergio, a 26-year-old autistic male is blind and has never seen a smile. He does, however, give everybody a sincere smile every day. A documentary based on the amazing story encapsulated by Sergio Aznarez Rosado's life.

programme.title: Talea
programme.desc: Summertime. Everybody is excited to go on vacation to Italy. Everybody but Jasmin. Jasmin is yearning something. She wants to be with Eva, her mother, from whom she had to live seperately for a long time. For weeks, Jasmin is trying to get close to Eva. She does not give up, even if she's rejected. After an argument, Jasmin runs away from her fosterhome and convinces Eva to leave the city together and go on a trip. The two get closer -- sometimes as friends, sometimes as mother and daughter. A first joint cigarette, a dance in the village disco, wanderings through the woods. But expectations and needs of the girl and her mother are diverging repeatedly, especially when a man attracts Eva's attention and disturbs the growing closeness between mother and daughter.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: A space cruiser crash lands on the purple planet of Heinous, an intergalactic prison that is home to the most vile and dangerous villains in the galaxy. All of the crew have perished except for its pilot; intergalactic space hero Max Cloud, the ships hapless chef Jake, and its reluctant Commander, Rexy. Their mission is simple, wait inside their vessel until help arrives and try their best to keep the prisoners outside from getting in, however this is Max Cloud and he doesn't do simple. ...But this is not real life. This is a video-game, and at the helm of the adventure is Sarah, a teenage video game fanatic who immerses herself in fantasy to avoid dealing with her less than packed social life and a strained relationship with her dad, straight laced single parent Tony. After a fallout, Tony bans Sarah from playing games and in a frenzy of teenage emotion Sarah makes a wish, that in the blink of an eye becomes a reality... With a flash of pixelated light Sarah is transported into the video game by the mysterious Space Witch, who exists in an etherial void, behind a secret door, that never appears in the same place twice! So Sarah finds herself trapped inside the game and the only person who can help her is her equally socially defunct but incredibly charming friend, Cowboy, who must control Sarah from her bedroom in Brooklyn and keep her from losing her one life, in a game that can't be paused, that they have never finished before! To make matters worse Sarah has not found herself inside the body of the wonderful Max Cloud, but Jake, that's right... the hapless chef. We follow Sarah as she negotiates the terrifying and dangerous planet of Heinous alongside the ever confident Max and fed up Rexy, jumping back and forth with the real world as the pressure mounts on Cowboy and the real stakes start to rise. They soon encounter stranded Bounty Hunter, Brock Donnelly, and realise they must get off the planet before help arrives as the planets surface burns so hot every day that anything not underground is space liquid! AND to add to the stakes Cowboy must keep his best friend away from the evil clutches of the games villain Revengor, a part man, part machine, lunatic who is hell bent on taking Max Clouds ship and with an army of prisoners and an evil sorcersss called SHEE, his chances look pretty damn good. The action bounces between the video game and the real world as Cowboy and Sarah must come together to get her home, all leading to the ultimate showdown in Revengors lair, where back in Brooklyn, video game expertise arrives in the form of a very unlikely hero. Sit down. Plug in. It's time to play THE INTERGALACTIC ADVENTURES OF MAX CLOUD.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: Max Richards, a teenage boy born with a medical condition of being lethally attractive, who is changed forever when he meets Alex, a girl with her own bizarre ailment, who aids him on his quest of self-discovery... without accidentally killing someone.

programme.title: The Cooler
programme.desc: Bernie Lootz (William H. Macy) is a long-time "cooler" at the Shangri-La casino in Las Vegas: he is paid to bring his black cloud to any table where a gambler is on a roll. But when Bernie's luck starts changing for the better--thanks in part to a pretty cocktail waitress--he suddenly loses his cooling talents, incurring the ire of the casino owner in the process.

programme.title: The Recall
programme.desc: The great Wesley Snipes (Blade himself!) stars as "The Hunter" in this Mauro Borrelli (The Ghostmaker) directed film. The Recall also stars RJ Mitte (Breaking Bad), Jedidiah Goodacre (Descendants), Niko Pepaj (Awkward), Laura Maria Bilgeri (Toby Goes to Camp) and Hannah Rose May (Ballers). The movie tells the tale of five friends vacationing at a remote lake house, expecting nothing less than a good time. Unbeknownst to them, Earth is under an alien invasion and in the thralls of a mass-abduction. Director Borelli is a former collaborator of director Tim Burton and the film illustrator for blockbuster films such as Pirates of the Caribbean and Captain America. The Recall will also be shot for the new Barco Escape three-screen, panoramic theatrical format, which fully surrounds audiences and offers the ultimate immersive cinema experience. Portions of the films will also be shot in Virtual Reality.

programme.title: Love Is Not Enough
programme.desc: Samir, must face his parent's breakup. While they meet to find the way to tell him, the little Samir surprises them, because he knows perfectly what's happening, putting his own parents into a hard place with his vision of the situation.

programme.title: The Zodiac
programme.desc: THE ZODIAC takes a different look at the famous Zodiac Killer case from other screen treatments of the murders. More than a simple crime story, the film is an emotional thriller focusing on the murders' impact on victims, their families and the wider community. The film follows a police detective and his son who become obsessed with the murders and endanger their family in the process.

programme.title: Almost Friends
programme.desc: Charlie, a culinary genius, has lost the motivation. He doesn't know what to with his life anymore, but he knows one thing - get close to Amber. In comparison to her boyfriend, he seems to be totally unattractive, but Charlie's closest friend convinces him that where there's a will there's a way.

programme.title: McCinsey's Island
programme.desc: A former secret agent finds a treasure map and decides to find the loot. But he is not the only one.

programme.title: Jungle Boy
programme.desc: In a humble village on the edge of the jungle, a young boy strays from his mother to play with a monkey. Lost in the jungle, he is saved by the great elephant, who will raise him as a member of the great family of animals. When he grows up he helps to protect the jungle from a ruthless poacher.

programme.title: Lost Treasure of Jesse James
programme.desc: A backwoods team of Missouri kids race to solve a 100 year old mystery and save their friends in this family friendly action adventure. Chased deep into ancient caves they must escape treasure hunters hot on their trail or be lost forever.

programme.title: Lost in Florence
programme.desc: When Eleroo advises Bumblelion to make a wish when getting the biggest part of the wishbone, it means trouble for poor Rhinokey for losing two bank bags of money. Bumblelion starts spending the money and looses his friends while Rhinokey manages to escape from Officer Eaglebeagle. Rhinokey tries to convince Bumblelion to return the bank bags, but Bumblelion decides to run off thinking that Rhinokey wants to steal his money. Soon after, Bumblelion realizes how Rhinokey lost the bank bags and returns the money to the police.

programme.title: North & South: The Battle of New Market
programme.desc: Based on a true story of the American Civil War, culminating at the Battle of New Market, May 1864. A group of teenage cadets sheltered from war at the Virginia Military Institute must confront the horrors of an adult world when they are called upon to defend the Shenandoah Valley. Leaving behind their youth, these cadets must decide what they are fighting for.

programme.title: See You in September
programme.desc: See You in September is an original romantic comedy set in current day Manhattan. The film centers around Lindsay, a beautiful woman who seemingly has it all, but is deeply afraid of commitment. When she finds out that her therapist takes a vacation for the entire month of August she feels shocked and abandoned. Instead of taking this news lying down, Lindsay enlists the help of her acerbic best friend Monica to come up with a solution. With the assistance of "Craig's List", Lindsay puts together a group therapy session for all Manhattanites who are in need of therapy, but more importantly angry at their therapists for abandoning them.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: The War Is Over
programme.desc: Following the bombardment of Kosovo in 1999, the Rahmanis and their three children emigrate to Switzerland. After years of living in their new homeland, the family faces the prospects of deportation. "No one is proud to be a refugee, but when it comes to me, I am not ashamed of who I am" says Rasim - the father of the family and an ex music teacher. Desperate to stay he invents an Albanian Dance Troupe in order to garner signatures of support from the community… The intimate narrative explores the experience of forced migration: the fraught decision to leave; the process of integration and adaptation to a new country; the impact on the family; and always, the yearning for the homeland.

programme.title: The Groomsmen
programme.desc: A 30-something man decides to marry his pregnant girlfriend and asks his four best friends to stand with him at the wedding, but as he observes his friends relationship troubles, he wrestles with issues of fatherhood, marriage and growing up.

programme.title: Miss Nobody
programme.desc: Unlucky in love, living at home with her eccentric mom, and stuck in a dead end secretarial job at Judge Pharmaceuticals, Sarah Jane longs for more out of life. Her surprise promotion to junior executive appears to be just the ticket. But with promotion comes a competitive new world of wily, complicated executives, and Sarah Jane begins to eliminate the competition the only way she knows how - murder. During her climb to the top, she unexpectedly falls for the man of her dreams, Detective Bill Malloy - the cop intent on cracking the case of the mysterious deaths at Judge Pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: In Ronny Yu's fast-moving crime-thriller, Samuel L Jackson plays Elmo McElroy, a pharmaceutical genius who has made a fortune in illegal drugs, particularly with Formula 51, which is more potent than heroin and crack. But instead of selling it to his drug lord employer the Lizard (Meatloaf), he flies to Liverpool where Felix (Robert Carlyle) is acting as broker for gangster Leopold Durant (Ricky Tomlinson). Durant is prepared to offer $20m for the formula; money Elmo would love to spend, if he can stay alive long enough.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: Science fiction movie. Canadian sci-fi, produced in 2017. A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

programme.title: Es esmu leģenda
programme.desc: Ģeniāls zinātnieks, kurš atklājis līdzekli pret cilvēku radītu postošu vīrusu, Roberts Nevils (Vils Smits), negaidīti izrādās imūns pret šo lipīgo vīrusu. Nu visi Ņujorkas un varbūt pat pasaules iedzīvotāji ir pārtapuši asinskārās būtnēs, kas baidās no gaismas un dzīvo, lai aplipinātu jebkuru dzīvu būtni, ko viņi sastop ceļā. Kopš civilizācijas iznīcināšanas brīža ir pagājuši trīs gadi, un vientulība Nevilam sāk kļūt par nastu. Dienā viņš pilsētā meklē pārtiku un visu nepieciešamo, kā arī sūta ziņojumus, cerot, ka kāds uz tiem atbildēs, bet naktīs viņš cenšas mainīt vīrusa radītās sekas, eksperimentējot ar savām asinīm. Bet laika nav daudz, jo inficēto pūlis vēro katru viņa soli, gaidot piemērotu brīdi uzbrukumam.

programme.title: Substance
programme.desc: Holivudas fitnesa zvaigznei Elizabetei ir viss, ko sieviete var vēlēties - skaistums, slava un ietekme. Taču pienāk laiks, kad vecuma pazīmes draud viņai to visu atņemt. Tādēļ brīdī, kad viņa uzzina par jauno produktu "Substance", kurš sola jaunāku un perfektāku sevi, viņa nevilcinās to izmēģināt.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Pavasara krāsas.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Es esmu leģenda
programme.desc: Ģeniāls zinātnieks, kurš atklājis līdzekli pret cilvēku radītu postošu vīrusu, Roberts Nevils (Vils Smits), negaidīti izrādās imūns pret šo lipīgo vīrusu. Kopš civilizācijas iznīcināšanas brīža ir pagājuši trīs gadi, un vientulība Nevilam sāk kļūt par nastu. Dienā viņš pilsētā meklē pārtiku un visu nepieciešamo, kā arī sūta ziņojumus, cerot, ka kāds uz tiem atbildēs, bet naktīs viņš cenšas mainīt vīrusa radītās sekas, eksperimentējot ar savām asinīm. Bet laika nav daudz, jo inficēto pūlis vēro katru viņa soli, gaidot piemērotu brīdi uzbrukumam.

programme.title: Londona sauc
programme.desc: Pēcn neveiksmīga darba un bēgšanas no Apvienotās Karalistes, neizdevies slepkava spiests pieskatīt sava jaunā noziedzības līdera dēlu un parādīt viņam, kā kļūt par vīrieti.

programme.title: Substance
programme.desc: Holivudas fitnesa zvaigznei Elizabetei ir viss, ko sieviete var vēlēties - skaistums, slava un ietekme. Taču pienāk laiks, kad vecuma pazīmes draud viņai to visu atņemt. Tādēļ brīdī, kad viņa uzzina par jauno produktu "Substance", kurš sola jaunāku un perfektāku sevi, viņa nevilcinās to izmēģināt.

programme.title: Es esmu leģenda
programme.desc: Ģeniāls zinātnieks, kurš atklājis līdzekli pret cilvēku radītu postošu vīrusu, Roberts Nevils (Vils Smits), negaidīti izrādās imūns pret šo lipīgo vīrusu. Kopš civilizācijas iznīcināšanas brīža ir pagājuši trīs gadi, un vientulība Nevilam sāk kļūt par nastu. Dienā viņš pilsētā meklē pārtiku un visu nepieciešamo, kā arī sūta ziņojumus, cerot, ka kāds uz tiem atbildēs, bet naktīs viņš cenšas mainīt vīrusa radītās sekas, eksperimentējot ar savām asinīm. Bet laika nav daudz, jo inficēto pūlis vēro katru viņa soli, gaidot piemērotu brīdi uzbrukumam.

programme.title: Londona sauc
programme.desc: Pēcn neveiksmīga darba un bēgšanas no Apvienotās Karalistes, neizdevies slepkava spiests pieskatīt sava jaunā noziedzības līdera dēlu un parādīt viņam, kā kļūt par vīrieti.

programme.title: Radio pirāti
programme.desc: Pēc patiesiem notikumiem veidota filma par rokenrola dīdžejiem, kuru "pirātu radio" 1960. gados aizrāvis un iedvesmojis britus. Atskaņojot savas desmitgades labāko un dumpīgāko mūziku, saujiņa dīdžeju pārdroši un ļoti komiski turas pretī valdības lēmumam slēgt radio staciju.

programme.title: Marta īdas
programme.desc: "Marta īdas" ir aizraujošs stāsts par ambīcijām, uzticību, nodevību un atriebību. Filma veidota pēc populāras lugas motīviem, un tā stāsta par kādu mārketinga un publisko attiecību ģēniju, kurš ir gatavs uz visu, lai palīdzētu viņa pārstāvētajam prezidenta amata kandidātam uzvarēt vēlēšanās.

programme.title: Mans puisis - slepkava
programme.desc: Pēc sava drauga pieķeršanas neuzticībā, Marta kļūst mazliet neprātīga. Bet tad viņa iepazīstas ar Frānsisu. Viņš škiet īstais, ideālais vīrtietis, ja vien.. viņš nebūtu profesionāls slepkava. Kad Marta sāk apjaust, ka viņas jaunais puisis nejoko, sacīdams "es iziešu ārā, lai kādu novāktu", lietas kļūst vēl sarežģītākas. Izrādās Frānsisu vajā kriminālie grupēji, kas ir arī viņa iepriekšējie darba devēji. Līķiem krājoties kaudzē, Martai jāizlemj vai viņa grib bēg ko kājas nes vai kļūt par cienīgu partneri savam pusim-slepkavam.

programme.title: Meitene vilcienā
programme.desc: Savā ikdienas braucienā uz Ņujorku nesen šķirtā Reičela Vatsone (Emīlija Blanta) gremdējas fantāzijās par māju, kurā viņa dzīvoja kopā ar bijušo vīru Tomu (Džastins Terū). Viņa ierauga jauno iedzīvotāju Meganu (Heiliju Benetu), kura ir satriecoši skaista sieviete un iemieso visu, ko Reičela jūt, ka ir zaudējusi. Atrodoties vilcienā, viņa ierauga vardarbīgu strīdu starp Meganu un vīru Skotu (Lūks Evanss). Reičela steidzas izkāpt no vilciena, taču viņai ir atmiņas zudums, iespējams, alkohola lietošanas dēļ. Viņa attopas asiņaina un klāta ar nobrāzumiem. Kad kļūst skaidrs, ka Megana ir pazudusi, viņa tiek ievilkta bīstamā intrigu un noslēpumu pasaulē, kas priekšpilsētā slēpta apkārtējo skatieniem.

programme.title: Atriebība
programme.desc: Kad noslēpumains zvanītājs novieto spridzekli zem Meta Tērnera mašīnas sēdekļa, sākas strauja pakaļdzīšanās pāri visai pilsētai, lai izpildītu virkni specifisku uzdevumu. Ar bērniem uz aizmugurējā sēdekļa un spridzekli, kas eksplodēs, ja viņi izkāps no mašīnas, ikdienišķs brauciens kļūst par spēli uz dzīvību un nāvi. Lai izdzīvotu un glābtu savu ģimeni, Metam ierobežotā laikā jāizpilda aizvien bīstamākas svešinieka norādes.

programme.title: Apokalipto
programme.desc: Maiju valstībai piedzīvojot tās norietu, jauns vīrietis dodas bīstamā ceļojumā uz pasauli, kurā valda bailes un apspiešana.

programme.title: Džeina Ostina sabojāja manu dzīvi
programme.desc: Agate - burvīga un pretrunu pilna, nonāk izmisīgā vienatnē. Viņas sapnis ir piedzīvot mīlestību, kura līdzinās Džeinas Ostinas romānam un viņas galvenais mērķis ir kļūt par rakstnieci. Tā vietā, viņa pavada savas dienas pārdodot grāmatas leģendārā britu grāmatnīcā Parīzē.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Pārgājiens Lahemā nacionālajā parkā.

programme.title: Ķīniešu mīkla
programme.desc: Kzavjē dzīve ir sarežģītāka nekā jebkad iepriekš. Viņš ir rakstnieks, dzīvo Parīzē kopā ar savu bērnu māti Vendiju, kura pēc ceļojuma uz Ņujorku paziņo, ka vēlas šķirties, jo satikusi kādu citu. Parīzē dzīvo arī Kzavjē draudzene Izabella, kura ir kopā ar ķīniešu izcelsmes amerikānieti. Sievietes vēlas bērnu un pierunā Kzavjē kļūt par spermas donoru, pirms pašas pārvāksies uz Ņujorku. Kad arī Vendija paziņo, ka kopā ar bērniem pārvāksies uz Ņujorku pie vīrieša, ar kuru nesen iepazinās, Kzavjē saprot, ka viņam nav izvēles - ja visi viņa bērni būs Ņujorkā, arī viņam jādodas turp.

programme.title: Ļoti labas meitenes
programme.desc: Divas Ņujorkas meitenes noslēdz paktu zaudēt nevainību pirmajā vasarā pēc vidusskolas beigšanas. Kad viņas abas iemīlas vienā un tajā pašā ielu māksliniekā, draudzeņu saikne pirmo reizi tiek pārbaudīta.

programme.title: Tālu no trokšņainā pūļa
programme.desc: Viktorijas laikmeta Anglijā neatkarīgā un stūrgalvīgā Batšeba Everdena ir lepna un skaista sieviete, kura piesaista triju dažādiem sabiedrības slāņiem piederošu vīriešu uzmanību. Pēc Batšebas tikšanās ar aitu fermas īpašnieku Gabriēlu Ouku pārgalvīgo seržantu Frensisu Troju un turīgo vecpuisi Viljamu Boldvudu, viņu dzīves vairs nekad nebūs tādas, kā iepriekš.

programme.title: Teikuma beigas
programme.desc: Pēc atbrīvošanas no cietuma jauns vīrietis negribīgi dodas ceļojumā kopā ar savu atsvešināto tēvu, lai izkaisītu mātes pelnus viņas dzimtajā Īrijā.

programme.title: Fabelmeni
programme.desc: Augot Arizonā pēc Otrā pasaules kara, jaunais Semijs Fabelmens pusaudža gados vēlas kļūt par kinorežisoru. Drīz vien viņš atklāj satriecošu ģimenes noslēpumu un pēta, kā filmu spēks var palīdzēt viņam saskatīt patiesību.

programme.title: Mana Māsīca Reičela
programme.desc: Filips ir jauns anglis, kura brālēns Ambrozs pēc došanās uz Florenci Itālijā nomirst. Viņš zvēr atriebību Ambroza sievai Reičelai, vainojot viņu visās nelaimēs.

programme.title: VĪRIETIS, KURU MĪLĒJA PAR DAUDZ
programme.desc: Francijas Rivjēra, 1970. gadi. Atstājusi pagātnē savas neveiksmīgās laulības, Agnese Le Rū atgriežas Nicā pie mātes - kazino "Vidusjūras pils" saimnieces. Šajā laikā Azūra piekrastē izceļas neafišēts "kazino karš", notiek īpašumu pārdale starp krimināliem grupējumiem, kas saasina jau tā sarežģītās attiecības ģimenē.

programme.title: Beigu sajūta
programme.desc: Vīrieti sāk vajāt pagātne - viņš saņem noslēpumainu mantojumu, kas liek viņam pārdomāt savu pašreizējo dzīves situāciju.

programme.title: Mana Māsīca Reičela

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chef's knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Buried in debt, Habanera and the Guero in Houston, Texas, is on the verge of closing. The infighting is destroying the business and a 3-year-old daughter is stuck in the middle. Robert Irvine will have to convince the owner, Ben, to step back from the obsessive control of his partner and chef, Vanessa, and concentrate on the rest of the restaurant, or Ben will lose both his business and his family.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Chopped

At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship
programme.desc: Four cupcake connoisseurs battle it out in this cooking competition series, hoping to prove they are the supreme cupcake bakers and take home the $10,000 prize. Each of these contestants are undoubtedly talented cupcake designers, but there can only be one winner, and the heat is on to showcase their artistry and flair when it comes to baking these little sweet treats. Hosted by Kardea Brown, the show give the bakers new challenges to complete in each episode, with the poorest performing contestant eliminated at each stage of the competition, resulting in a final showdown between the very best.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chef's knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Every region has its own local culture and flavor. One of the best ways for a traveler to immerse him or herself in new destinations is to taste these unique dishes. This taste exploration allows even the strictest of dieters the freedom to indulge. In the new series, Travel Channel's Man v. Food, host Adam Richman sets out to travel the country in search of the best places to do some serious indulging. Starting season 5, Casey Webb took over as host.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: Sun's out, grills out! Michael Symon soaks up the summertime weather and fires up his grill to encourage everyone to get cooking out with his easy and crowd-pleasing outdoor dinners. From sticky ribs to desserts, Michael shares his grilling tips and tricks to make every meal flamingly delicious. Self-shot from his New York backyard, cook along with Michael as he works live fire to show how simple and fun it is to make amazing dishes on the outdoor grill.

programme.title: Ready Jet Cook
programme.desc: Jet Tila whips up two Thai takeout favourites that are easy to make from home, Ali's favourite panang curry and a late-night staple, drunken noodles.

programme.title: Ready Jet Cook
programme.desc: Jet Tila proves just how delicious chicken can be by serving up a mouthwatering Thai BBQ chicken with papaya salad and three cup chicken.

programme.title: Outchef'd
programme.desc: Host Eddie Jackson gives everyday home cooks the shock of their lives when he reveals that they've actually shown up not to audition, but to face off in a one-on-one cooking challenge against culinary greats like Alex Guarnaschelli, Geoffrey Zakarian and Anne Burrell.

programme.title: Outchef'd
programme.desc: Host Eddie Jackson gives everyday home cooks the shock of their lives when he reveals that they've actually shown up not to audition, but to face off in a one-on-one cooking challenge against culinary greats like Alex Guarnaschelli, Geoffrey Zakarian and Anne Burrell.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: Hosts and judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini welcome 10 talented chefs to Ciao House, where they will live together in a beautiful Tuscan villa and be tested like never before on their proficiency with Italian cuisine. Two chefs receive a huge advantage going into the next round, and one chef must say "Ciao Ciao" to the villa.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Buried in debt, Habanera and the Guero in Houston, Texas, is on the verge of closing. The infighting is destroying the business and a 3-year-old daughter is stuck in the middle. Robert Irvine will have to convince the owner, Ben, to step back from the obsessive control of his partner and chef, Vanessa, and concentrate on the rest of the restaurant, or Ben will lose both his business and his family.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. Every participant of the show has a budget of $500 to purchase the groceries from the customers of a nearby supermarket, and create dishes later out of it. In each round the host assigns the theme of the dish to cook. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay V. Symon
programme.desc: Join our hosts, renowned celebrity chefs and restaurateurs Bobby Flay and Michael Symon, as they test the skills of eight expert barbecue connoisseurs. Filmed at the Star Hill Ranch in Austin, Texas, the eight chefs are divided into two teams but, in order to claim first pick for their team, Bobby and Michael go head-to-head in a backyard BBQ challenge. Each episode sees one of the chefs being eliminated from the show until there is only one left, the winner who is awarded the title of 'Master of Cue'. The weekly contests aim to reveal the chefs' talents and expose their weaknesses and include tasks such as cooking up a tomahawk rib-eye and taking on a Texas beef challenge.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Next Baking Master: Paris
programme.desc: Hosts Stephanie Boswell and Ludo Lefebvre invite ten up-and-coming American bakers to travel to the epicenter of the sweets universe, Paris, where they will vie to become this generation's great baking master. With unprecedented access to the most iconic pastry shops and experts, their Paris adventure will test their chops in pastry technique, artistry, innovation and flavor. Each week, the lowest performing pastry chef is sent home until one remaining competitor is named the next baking master.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Pro et contra
programme.desc: 'Pro et Contra' aims to shed light on the perceived wisdom concerning Ukrainian historical events to reveal the factual true stories about what actually happened. Debunking previously held beliefs and concepts, the program shows how distorted facts and falsified accounts created a web of hostile myths extending back for hundreds of years. The opinions of experts enable us to see these events from different viewpoints and come to a truthful conclusion.

programme.title: The Historical Background
programme.desc: The documentary project "The History of the Question" reveals the secret pages of the past to explain the logic of modern war. Through the analysis of declassified archives and the opinions of experts - from historians to military analysts - the project explores the roots of Russia's imperial policy and Ukraine's centuries-old resistance. This is a detailed analysis of how history is repeating itself today and what mechanisms of destruction of the Ukrainian people have been hidden behind the scenes of the Kremlin for decades.

programme.title: Decolonizations
programme.desc: The 3-part documentary series deals with the little-known circumstances of the destruction of colonies and the process of decolonization of the so-called Third World.

programme.title: The Last Day of the Dictator
programme.desc: The program delves deeply into the last days of a dictator's rule, examining political conflicts, social unrest, and decisive moments that led to the fall of authority. Episodes provide detailed narratives of government decisions, protests, and personal accounts, offering viewers insight into the human, political, and societal consequences of authoritarian regimes. By exploring these events, audiences gain a comprehensive understanding of power, resistance, and the dramatic processes that shape history.

By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: Pieskāriens
programme.desc: Romantisks un saviļņojošs stāsts, kas aptver vairākus gadu desmitus un kontinentus. Viena vīrieša emocionāls ceļojums, kurā viņš cenšas atrast savu pirmo mīlestību, kas pazuda pirms 50 gadiem.

programme.title: Nezvēri
programme.desc: No dzimtenes izceļojis franču pāris Spānijas laukos vada organisko saimniecību, taču rodas nesaskaņas ar vietējiem ciemata iedzīvotājiem.

programme.title: Titāniks
programme.desc: Savā pirmajā braucienā dodas pasaules lielākais kuģis "Titāniks". Uz kuģa klāja tūkstošiem cilvēku ar cerībām un bailēm gaida nokļūšanu galamērķī – Amerikā. Starp šiem cilvēkiem ir nabadzīgs mākslinieks Džeks, kā arī septiņpadsmit gadus vecā Roza – skaista un bagāta meitene, kurai apnikusi vecāku ārišķīgā un liekulīgā pasaule. "Titānika" būvētāji ir pārliecināti par to, ka kuģi nav iespējams nogremdēt, taču, kad kuģa ceļā gadās milzīgs aisbergs, Rozas un Džeka romantiskais piedzīvojums pārvēršas cīņā par izdzīvošanu.

programme.title: Rūķi
programme.desc: Hloja un viņas mamma pārvācas – jau ATKAL! Turklāt viņas pārvācas uz necilu, vecu māju, kas pilna ar dārza rūķiem. Drīz Hloja gan atklāj, ka šī māja slēpj biedējošu noslēpumu. Kādu dienu pēc skolas Hloja kopā ar kaimiņu Liamu atklāj, ka rūķi patiesībā ir dzīvi! Kā izrādās, jau gadiem rūķi ir sargājuši planētu no draudīgiem maziem monstriem, kuri iebrukuši mājā caur portālu, kas ved uz citu pasauli. Kad vienīgais līdzeklis, kas varētu palīdzēt uzveikt monstrus, skolā nonāk nepareizajās rokās, Hlojai un Liamam jāsadarbojas ar rūķiem, lai cīnītos pret mazo negantnieku iebrukumu un glābtu pasauli!

programme.title: Sliktie
programme.desc: Leģendārais laupītāju piecinieks - Misters Vilks, Misters Čūska, Misters Piraija, Misters Haizivs un Mis Tarantula - bija labākie no sliktajiem, bet tagad ļoti cenšas būt labākie no labākajiem. Taču tā vietā viņi pret pašu gribu tiek iepīti jaunā, pasaules mēroga aplaupīšanas projektā, ko plāno kāda pārsteidzoša komanda - Sliktās meitenes. Vai Sliktajiem izdosies noturēties labo komandā? Kādi galvu reibinoši piedzīvojumi viņus sagaida šoreiz?

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Kamēr bijušais dižais ļaundaris Gru sāk iejusties ģimenes cilvēka lomā un mēģina godīgi pelnīt iztiku, pārdodot ievārījumu, Antarktīdā kāds nozog slepenu laboratoriju. Ļaunuma apkarošanas organizācijai ir nepieciešama palīdzība, un tās pārstāvji ierodas pie Gru. Kopā ar organizācijas ekscentrisko aģenti Lūsiju Vaildu viņš secina, ka galvenais aizdomās turamais ir par mirušu uzskatītais supernelietis El Mačo, kura dēls ir ieskatījies Gru vecākajā meitā Margo. Pārlieka vēlēšanās pasargāt meitas un arvien pieaugošās simpātijas pret Lūsiju aizmiglo Gru prātu, tādēļ meklējumi nevedas. Tikmēr kāds nelietis paklusām nolaupa Gru palīgus.

programme.title: Bēbis boss
programme.desc: Tims Templtons ir savu vecāku uzmanības centrā. Un tā tas ir līdz brīdim, kad viņš satiek savu jauno brālīti – jaundzimušo pieguļošā uzvalkā ar uzņēmēja iemaņām. Abi kašķējas kā jau visi brāļi, izmantojot gan pazemojošas izjokošanas, gan tuvcīņas. Tomēr viņi beidz savas domstarpības, kad bēbis boss atklāj savu ģeniālo plāno, kā iegūt atpakaļ uzmanību, kas veltīta viņu galvenajiem konkurentiem kucēniem. Abi savāc pilsētas mazo bērnu bandu un ar šīs dīvainās komandas palīdzību mēģina izjaukt gaidāmo pasākumu mājdzīvniekiem, lai atgūtu mazuļu likumīgo vietu mīlīguma hierarhijā.

programme.title: Grāmatu zagle
programme.desc: Filma "Grāmatu zagle", kuras pamatā ir pasaulē populārs romāns, ir stāsts par neparastu, enerģisku meiteni, kuru Otrā pasaules kara laikā Vācijā nosūta dzīvot audžuģimenē. Meiteni ieintriģē vienīgā grāmata, ko viņa paņēmusi līdzi, tāpēc viņa sāk kolekcionēt grāmatas. Ar savu jauno vecāku un zem kāpnēm mītošā slepenā viesa palīdzību meitene iemācās lasīt un izveido brīnumainu pasauli, kas iedvesmo viņus visus.

programme.title: Kaut tu būtu šeit
programme.desc: Jauna dāma, meklējot dzīvei uguntiņu, pavada romantisku nakti kopā ar kādu jaunekli. Atklādama, ka vīrietis ir nedziedināmi slims, sieviete apņemas palīdzēt viņam pilnvērtīgi nodzīvot pēdējās šeit atvēlētās dienas.

programme.title: Dusmīgie putni. Filma
programme.desc: Reiz uz kādas paradīzes salas dzīvoja putni, kas nemācēja lidot. Tāpēc viņi visi bija labi, miermīlīgi un laimīgi... Precīzāk, gandrīz visi. Uz pārējo salas iemītnieku fona depresīvais Reds, trauksmainais Čaks un neveiklais Bumba izcēlās ar savu neparedzamo uzvedību un skaitījās izstumtie. Taču, kad salā pēkšņi parādījās noslēpumainās zaļās cūkas, kam noteikti aiz ādas bija kāda cūcība, tieši Reds, Čaks un Bumba stājās viņiem pretī!

programme.title: Dusmīgie putni. Filma
programme.desc: Nelidojošie dusmīgie putni joprojām karo ar viltīgajām zaļajām cūkām. Viņi ir ļaunākie ienaidnieki, un, šķiet, nekas nespēs to mainīt. Taču, kad pie apvāršņa parādās jaunas briesmas, kas apdraud viņus visus, putniem un cūkām nāksies apvienoties, lai glābtu savas mājas.

programme.title: After. Uz visiem laikiem
programme.desc: Pēc šķiršanās no savas dzīves patiesās mīlestības bestselleru autors Hardins Skots ceļo uz Portugāli, lai izlīdzinātu savus pagātnes nodarījumus.

programme.title: Brāļi Sisteri
programme.desc: Pārgalvīgie brāļi ar dīvainajiem uzvārdiem ir zeltrača un avantūrista Vorma meklējumos - šo uzdevumu viņi ir saņēmuši no noslēpumainā Komandora. Būdami atlīdzības mednieki, dzenoties pakaļ savam jaunajam upurim, viņi pat nenojauš, ka ir iepinušies bīstamā spēlē, kurā savus neapvaldāmos raksturus būs jāapvieno ar asu prātu un prasmi rīkoties ar ieroci.

programme.title: Eņģeļa krišana
programme.desc: Maiks Benings pilnībā nododas valsts dienestam, viņa galvenais uzdevums – gādāt par ASV prezidenta drošību. Kolēģi, ar kuriem Benings daudzus gadus strādājis plecu pie pleca, viņam neuzticas, tur viņu aizdomās par nodomu nonāvēt valsts galvu. Lai glābtu ne vien savu godu, bet arī dzīvību, Benings ir spiests slēpties un noskaidrot, kas un kāpēc ievilina viņu un prezidentu slazdā.

programme.title: Bīstamās līgavas māsas
programme.desc: Kad naudaskāri bandīti grib sagrābt greznu kāzu viesus par ķīlniekiem, viņi vēl nezina, ka līgavas māsa ir slepenā aģente, kura ir gatava uz visu, ja kāds mēģinās izjaukt viņas labākās draudzenes kāzas.

programme.title: Grāfs Monte-Kristo
programme.desc: Izbēdzis no cietuma uz salas, kurā, nepatiesi apsūdzēts par valsts nodevību, pavadījis četrpadsmit gadus, Edmunds Dantess atgriežas kā grāfs Monte-Kristo, lai atriebtos vīriem, kas viņu nodevuši.

programme.title: Strāvas karš
programme.desc: Dramatisks sāncensības stāsts par elektrības atklāšanas laikmeta titāniem Tomasu Edisonu un Džordžu Vestinghausu, lai noskaidrotu, kura izgudrotā elektriskā sistēma būs noteicošā modernizētajā pasaulē.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Superļaundaris Gru ir izmests no darba, jo neapturēja jaunāko cilvēces apdraudētāju. Viņš zaudē dzīvesprieku, bet to atgūst, kad uzzina, ka viņa neredzētais dvīņubrālis Dru vēlas viņu satikt. Gru ar ģimeni dodas uz brāļa grezno dzīvesvietu. Brāļi kopā uzsāks cīņu pret Baltazaru Bretu, kurš bērnībā bija slavenība, taču tagad kļuvis par superļaundari, kurš terorizē pasauli. Minioni uzsāk protesta streiku pret to, ka Gru vispār neinteresē iespēja valdīt pār pasauli.

programme.title: Dogmens
programme.desc: Kad uzticīgais policijas suns un viņa saimnieks dežūras laikā gūst ievainojumus, ārsti paveic dzīvību glābjošu operāciju, un no viņiem abiem top viens - atjautīgais Dogmens! Viņš dod svinīgo policista zvērestu aizsargāt un kalpot. Tikko Dogmens sāk pildīt policista uzdevumus un cenšas atstāt labu iespaidu uz priekšnieku, viņam tiek sarežģīts uzdevums - jāaptur superļaundara kaķa Pītija varenais plāns.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Mīlīgā mazpilsētiņā atrodas melna māja ar nedzīvu zālāju. Kaimiņi pat nenojauš, ka zem mājas atrodas milzu paslēptuve. Sīku pakalpiņu armijas apsargāts, Grū kaldina plānus lielākajai laupīšanai pasaules vēsturē. Viņš ir iecerējis nolaupīt Mēnesi. Jā, Mēnesi! Grū patīk viss ļaunais. Bruņojies ar samazināšanas lāzeru, sasaldēšanas staru un dažnedažādiem kaujas transporta līdzekļiem braukšanai pa zemi un pa gaisu, viņš iznīdē visu, kas gadās ceļā, līdz kādu dienu sastop trīs bārenītes ar apbrīnojamu gribasspēku…

programme.title: Bridžita Džounsa 2. Saprāta robeža
programme.desc: Bridžita Džonsa ir kā apreibusi no attiecībām ar Marku Dārsiju. Viņš ir izglītots, gādīgs un arī iecietīgs pret katru (gandrīz) Bridžitas greizsirdības lēkmi. Kādēļ gan lai ikviena Londonas sieviete nekristu kārdinājumā atņemt Marku tuklajai, ietiepīgajai un dažreiz nepiedienīgajai Bridžitai? Kad pie apvāršņa parādās garkājaina asistente, rozā mākonītis virs Bridžitas galvas savelkas aizdomīgi pelēks, un viņa ar skubu metas pārbaudīt abu attiecības. Taču, kad Bridžitai šķiet, ka sliktāk vairs nevar būt, parādās viņas bijušais priekšnieks, brunču mednieks un siržu lauzējs Daniels Klīvers.

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Vikingu pusaudzis Hikaps dzīvo Berkas salā kopā ar savu valdonīgo tēvu. Kaujas ar pūķiem ir vikingu ikdiena un dzīves veids, taču Hikapu tās neaizrauj. Tā vietā viņš labprātāk nododas visvisādiem izgudrojumiem un apkārtnes iepazīšanai. Reiz kādā no saviem klejojumiem Hikaps sastop ievainotu pūķi, kuram palīdz atkal lidot. Šī sastapšanās maina abu dzīves. Un, kad pienāk iesvētību laiks – lielā iespēja kaujā ar pūķiem sevi pierādīt tēvam un visai ciltij –, Hikaps rīkojas pavisam neparasti.

programme.title: Vai tu esi tur, Dievs? Te es, Mārgareta!
programme.desc: Kad ģimene pārceļas no piepilsētas uz pilsētu, 11 gadus vecā Mārgareta meklē jaunus draugus, sajūtas un cīnās ar atstumtību.

programme.title: Didi
programme.desc: 2008. gadā, pēdējā vasaras mēnesī pirms vidusskolas sākuma, 13 gadus vecs zēns iemācās to, ko viņa ģimene nevar viņam iemācīt: kā slidot, kā flirtēt un kā mīlēt savu mammu.

programme.title: Un kundze
programme.desc: Britu komēdija par līgavu, kura nav gatava pieņemt, ka viņas līgavainis pēkšņi nomirst, un uzstāj, ka viņai tāpat viņš jāaprec, - lai vai kādi būtu sabiedrības uzskati, likumi un tuvāko domas.

programme.title: After. Pēc kritiena
programme.desc: Tesa ir gatava jaunam dzīves posmam. Spožais prestižas koledžas diploms paver jaunas iespējas – meitene atrod sapņu darbu starptautiskā kompānijā. Viņas nodoms pārcelties uz Sietlu nemaz neiepriecina Hārdinu. Viņa neapmierinātība, pārmetumi un mūžīgā greizsirdība sāpīgi ievaino Tesu un rada bažas. Vai ir vērts visu likt uz kārts un upurēt daudzsološu karjeru? Taču kā lai aizmirst kopā pavadītās naktis un kaislīgos skūpstus, viņa ciešos vīrieša apskāvienus un tuvību, kas padara traku?

programme.title: Pasaules gala mednieki
programme.desc: Pēc tam kad milzīga saules uzliesmojuma dēļ tiek iznīcināta Zemes austrumu puslode, drosmīgs algots dārgumu mednieks dodas uz Eiropu, lai atrastu iekāroto "Monu Lizu", taču drīz saprot, ka pasaulei šobrīd vajag varoni vairāk nekā gleznu.

programme.title: MotoGP: Grand Prix of Catalonia
programme.desc: MotoGP race action from the Grand Prix of Catalunya.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Real Madrid - Oviedo
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: UFC. Arnold Allen-Melquizael Costa
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Women's MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Espanyol - Athletic Bilbao
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Rodeo: Pro Bull Riding. Tacoma
programme.desc: "The Toughest Sport on Dirt" comes to major venues around America, where the Top 35 bull riders in the world compete week in and week out on the Built Ford Tough Series.

programme.title: WRC. Portugāle. Apskats
programme.desc: Action from the World Rally Championship.

programme.title: MotoGP: Grand Prix of Catalonia
programme.desc: MotoGP race action from the Grand Prix of Catalunya.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Valencia - Rayo Vallecano
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Futbols: Ligue 1. Lens - PSG
programme.desc: PSG, AS Monaco, Marseille, Olympique Lyonnais & Lille... just to name a few. Ligue 1 is currently full of well-organised football teams and incredible European talent, who are a complement to the sport. As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: Futbols: Serie A. Napoli - Bologna
programme.desc: Coverage of Italy's top-flight football league.

programme.title: MotoGP: Grand Prix of Catalonia
programme.desc: MotoGP race action from the Grand Prix of Catalunya.

programme.title: ATP Rome 2026. Singles. Final
programme.desc: Report of the Internazionali BNL d'Italia, the tennis tournament for men in Rome.

programme.title: Cīņu sports: One Championship. ONE Friday Fights
programme.desc: ONE Championship is a mixed martial arts (MMA) organization that showcases world-class fighters from across the globe. With a focus on martial arts values and a commitment to integrity, the league promotes adrenaline-pumping, action-packed fights that entertain and inspire fans worldwide. ONE Championship not only showcases the skills of elite fighters, but also highlights the cultural aspects of martial arts, making it a unique and captivating sporting experience.

programme.title: MotoGP: Grand Prix of Catalonia
programme.desc: MotoGP race action from the Grand Prix of Catalunya.

programme.title: Cīņu sports: One Championship. ONE Fight Night
Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple wants to buy their first home on Aquidneck Island, RI. With a toddler and a baby on the way, they hope for a property with a yard, an open floor plan and something they can fix up to build equity in their starter home.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple follows a job opportunity to Long Beach, New York. They want their twins to grow up by the ocean and spend as much time outdoors as possible, so they hunt for a home near the water with a backyard.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. programme.title: Flip or Flop

programme.title: Unsellable Houses

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Twin sisters Leslie Davis and Lyndsay Lamb have a knack for helping desperate homeowners sell their lifeless homes; the sisters make necessary, impactful renovations that convert unlovable houses into diamonds in the rough.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroit's iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna jumps at the chance to design and transform her parents' outdoor patio into a reimagined and multifunctional glass-enclosed space; her dad plans to pot plants and both parents can enjoy gathering with friends and family around a fire.

programme.title: Mini Reni
programme.desc: Joanna takes on her first reno in New York, blending warm and neutral colors with soft textures to create a modern workspace with hints of historic charm. She has only eight weeks to complete an inspiring office for her friend Hoda Kotb's new business.

programme.title: Reno My Rental
programme.desc: Reno My Rental follows reigning Design Star: Next Gen champion, interior designer and social media influencer Carmeon Hamilton as she helps renters make their place feel like home. Set in her hometown of Memphis, Tennessee, Carmeon gives renters a major style upgrade that turns their bland backdrops into unforgettable homes--all without compromising the property's structure. Using the skills and signature design aesthetic that made her a major social media influencer, Carmeon maximizes, personalizes and elevates client rentals into extraordinary places with striking custom pieces made from everyday items, wow-factor wall treatments and a plethora of plants and greenery.

programme.title: Renovation Impossible
programme.desc: A woman and her husband aren't entirely sure how to bring new life to the outdated childhood home that she inherited from her mother; Russell and his team work around their tight budget to modernize the property while preserving her mom's memory.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their property's full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.
